title: Spectrophotometric Studies of Iron(M)-5,7, dibromo  Ozine N-oxide complex
author: A. N. Bhat
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Spretrophotometric studies of iron (III)-5,7,dibromo wine N-oxide complex have been carried out end the presence of at least two complexes (1:1; 1:2) is reported. Comparative studies of iron (III) N-oxide indicate that the equilibrium constant for the 1:2 complex in the same of 5,7,dibromo amine N-oxine it higher than that in the  case  of 1 :1 iron (III)-oxine N-oxide complex. The reagent, however does not offer any advantage over oxine N-oxide as a spretrophotometric reagent for iron and is, in fact inferior in many respects to most of the well-known and commonly used calorimetric reagents for iron.
steps_raw: Spretrophotometric studies of iron (III)-5,7,dibromo wine N-oxide complex have been carried out end the presence of at least two complexes (1:1; 1:2) is reported. The reagent, however does not offer any advantage over oxine N-oxide as a spretrophotometric reagent for iron and is, in fact inferior in many respects to most of the well-known and commonly used calorimetric reagents for iron.
